title: Dart Basics: A Quick Introduction
subtitle: Get up to speed with the language behind Flutter.
author: Alex Johnson

content.value: Dart is a client-optimized language for fast apps on any platform. It's the language used for Flutter and also runs on the server (via Dart VM) and web (compiled to JavaScript).
Dart has sound null safety. By default, variables cannot be null unless you explicitly mark them as nullable.
Dart is an easy-to-learn language with modern features. It's a great foundation for building Flutter apps and beyond.

meta.title: Dart Basics: Learn the Language for Flutter Development
meta.description: A quick guide to Dart syntax, variables, functions, classes, null safety, and async programming. Perfect for Flutter beginners.

faq.question: Is Dart similar to JavaScript?
faq.answer: Dart has some similarities but is statically typed and class-based. It's more structured.

faq.question: Do I need to learn Dart before Flutter?
faq.answer: Yes, a basic understanding of Dart is recommended to build Flutter apps effectively.
